page_content:
"C-" or better.

All courses presented for the minor must be taken at the University of

Maryland, College Park.

Students may use a maximum of six credits or two courses to satisfy

the requirements of both a major and a minor.

The Department of Plant Science and Landscape Architecture has mandatory advising for each of its major and minor programs. Students are required to meet with their advisor at least twice a year.

Students matriculating to this minor will need MATH113 or higher
